import React from 'react'; /** * Footer component - Footer section with copyright and links * @param {Object} props - Component props * @param {string} props.companyName - Company name for copyright * @param {number} props.currentYear - Current year for copyright * @param {Array} props.links - Array of footer link objects */ const Footer = ({ companyName = "PlanWise", currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(), links = [ { text: "Privacy Policy", href: "#" }, { text: "Terms of Service", href: "#" }, { text: "Contact", href: "#" } ] }) => { return (

{companyName}

Smart leave planning that saves you time and money.

Quick Links

    {links.map((link, index) => (
  • {link.text}
    • ))}

Contact

Email: support@planwise.com
Phone: +1 (555) 123-4567

© {currentYear} {companyName}. All rights reserved.

); }; export default Footer;
